articles.title: Brazil monitors two patients for possible Ebola infection - BBC
articles.description: If confirmed, they would be the first infection cases outside Africa, since the outbreak began in DR Congo.
articles.content: Ebola spreads through direct contact with the bodily fluids of an infected person, including sweat, saliva, blood, semen, excrement, urine and vomit.

articles.title: Africa CDC Says Over 1,100 Suspected Ebola Cases In DR Congo And Uganda - Barron's
articles.description: More than 1,100 people were suspected of having contracted Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighbouring Uganda, the head of the African Union's health agency said on Sunday in a commentary for the Financial Times.
